article_title: 用 AGENTS.md 和 Skills 让 AI 编程更像团队协作
core_theme: 用仓库级 AGENTS.md 提供项目上下文，用 task-level skills 提供可复用任务步骤，再用 CI 和评审检查 AI 生成结果。
reader_takeaway: 读者能理解团队使用 AI 编程工具时，怎样把项目约定、重复任务和验证流程放进仓库。
summary_angle: 把分散的个人提示词，整理成 AGENTS.md、Skills、Verification 三层可复用协作流程。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 AGENTS.md: Project-Level Context 章节，AGENTS.md 放在仓库根目录，记录项目概览、架构、技术栈和编码约定。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧是一本文档手册，向中间流水线提供项目地图。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 Skills: Task-Level Instructions 章节，skills 放在 .github/skills/，每个 skill 记录重复任务的步骤、模板和测试要求。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中间是几张任务卡片进入同一条生成流水线。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 The Verification Layer 章节，AI 辅助变更经过 targeted CI、测试、CodeQL、lint 和 PR review。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧是检查门，测试、lint、review 三个图标依次亮起。

main_metaphor: 一条代码生产线先读取团队手册，接着执行任务卡，然后通过检查门。
primary_subject: 一条由 AGENTS.md 手册、skills 卡片和 CI 检查门组成的代码流水线
subject_action: 手册和任务卡共同引导生成文件，文件通过检查门后进入代码库。
composition: 等距空间，左到右层级推进
comic_style_reason: 这篇文章讲的是从上下文到任务步骤再到验证的流程，适合用日漫式分镜表现顺序推进。
draft_goal: 第一轮验证三段流程是否清楚：AGENTS.md 提供上下文，skills 提供任务步骤，CI 和评审做检查。
revision_targets: 避免画成真实 GitHub 页面
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: coordinating AI-assisted development with AGENTS.md, reusable skills, and verification. The reader should quickly feel that team context and repeatable task instructions turn scattered AI coding into a shared engineering workflow.

Summary angle: compress the article into one readable left-to-right workflow: project context, task instructions, verification gate.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 3 supporting narrative beats.
Information blocks:
- mechanism: AGENTS.md gives project-level context, visible label "项目上下文"
- step: skills encode repeatable task steps, visible label "任务步骤", numeric fact "4"
- takeaway: CI, tests, lint, CodeQL, and review verify the generated work, visible label "验证"

Main metaphor: a code production line reads a team handbook, follows reusable task cards, then passes through a verification gate.
Subject: an isometric workflow made of an AGENTS.md handbook, skill cards, generated files, and a CI review gate, all connected as one clear line.
Composition/framing: isometric scene with left-to-right staged progression. Prefer horizontal storytelling that stays legible in a wide cover.
Style/medium: final style must be japanese-manga, interpreted through isometric conceptual systems scene. Stylized ink lines, restrained speed lines, limited color, polished, clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover.
Color palette: ink black, warm yellow, soft teal, paper white.
Visible text policy: allow only these short Chinese labels or numeric chips: "项目上下文", "任务步骤", "验证", "4", and no more than 4 total text items. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: real product screenshots, fake dashboards, English slogans, complex architecture node names, dense code rain, brand logo collage.
